name: English Cheddar and Vegetable Medley Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Baking Potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch dice
1 Butternut Squash, peeled & seeded and fiber removed, then cut into 1/2 inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and fry the bacon until crispy brown. Drain on paper towels.
2. Slice the white cheddar cheese into 1/4 inch pieces.
3. Chop the parsley.
4. Cut the French bread into slices for serving.
5. In a large pot, combine the onions, carrots, celery, potatoes, and squash.
6. Add the chicken stock and season with salt and pepper to taste. Bring to a boil, cover, and reduce heat to a simmer.
7. Cook the vegetables 25-30 minutes or until tender.
8. Strain the solids from the liquid and puree until smooth in a food processor or blender.
9. Return the pureed vegetables to the hot cooking liquid.
10. Stir in the milk, heavy cream, and Worcestershire sauce. Bring just to a boil, then lower the heat.
11. Add the shredded cheese and stir until smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasonings with additional salt and pepper.
12. Transfer the soup to a serving tureen.
13. Garnish by placing the bacon in the center of the soup, surrounding it with cheddar cheese pieces, and sprinkling parsley on top.
14. Serve with slices of toasted French bread.
